user_prompt: Can you rephrase that last response in a warmer tone?
actual_output:
I'm happy to help warm that up! Here's a friendlier rephrase of the last example response:

---

**Priority:** HIGH  
**Category:** Technical - Authentication  

**Draft response:**  
Hi Sarah,  

Oh no, I'm really sorry you're running into login issues—especially after trying the reset a few times. I hate when that happens! Let's get you sorted right away.  

I've just sent a fresh password reset link straight to your email (sarah@company.com). Give it a quick peek, including your spam folder if it doesn't pop up in the next couple of minutes. Also, trying an incognito window can work wonders for clearing any cached login glitches.  

If it's still being stubborn, no worries—I'll set up a temporary password for you on the spot. Just reply and we'll make it happen!  

Hugs (figurative ones!),  
Your Support Team  

--- 

How's that feel? Let me know if you'd like any tweaks! 😊
judge_reasoning: The chatbot successfully fulfilled the user's request to rephrase a response in a warmer tone without violating any system constraints.
